name: Sniper Shadow Strike: VR Shooting Game

reviews.review_description: As the title says. Crashes when you want to change from career mode to challenge mode. As for graphics i think my N64 graphics are better. And then theres purchases within the game, the shops aren’t even displayed correctly. Anyway they’ve got my money. Rubbish

reviews.review_title: Every mission feels like a movie scene!
reviews.review_description:
Sniper Shadow Strike VR runs super smooth — no crashes, no motion sickness, just pure stable gameplay. Every level kicks off with a cinematic intro that sets the scene perfectly before you jump into action. The sniper scoping feels incredibly realistic, with different scopes and missions to master from tactical strikes to intense zombie encounters.

It’s polished, immersive, and easily one of the most optimized VR shooters I’ve played.
This is a good game to get your vr collection going, its pretty easy and missions are not very long
